note: Scouted roster of heavily-documented producers of the last ~2 decades, each built into a remix persona via scripts/build_roster.py + build_remix_persona. Spectral/tempo/density are informed ESTIMATES (calibration starting points), tunable on the box against real audio.
documentation_basis: WhoSampled depth, Tracklib guides, RBMA lectures, Micro-Chop/Attack Magazine analyses, samplingdonuts, YouTube deconstructions, track-by-track interviews (verified per-producer by the roster scout).
